name: Serial Designation J - Beach Date
description:
"The return of the Yeast has been foretold in ancient prophecy. The legends whisper that in his return he will bring to us, a murder drones beach bot."

What's up people the Yeast is back yet again with a murder drones beach bot. It has been almost 1 month since I announced my return and I hope the wait has been worth it because I have cooked up a J beach bot just for you, my loyal viewers. Hope you enjoy and be sure to leave a review!

Artist: Sylwia
creator: hsrtjfyjrt
